name: phase3-on-save-app-ui
description: Review Phase 3 app_ui.py for correctness when saved

action.message:
Phase 3 app_ui.py was just saved. Review it for:
1. /frame always returns HTTP 200 — never 204 or 404; falls back to _PLACEHOLDER_JPEG
2. _PLACEHOLDER_JPEG is base64-decoded at module load, not per-request
3. /vision_status returns enabled, running, frames, staleness, error fields
4. /reinit calls _init() and updates _init_error
5. /camera/reconnect checks is_running() before calling start()
6. _init() called at module load in try/except — does not crash Flask on failure
7. atexit.register(_cleanup) calls _camera_policy.cleanup() on exit
8. SSE queue drained before each new /execute call
9. _event_cb is a named function (not lambda) passed to DeepRacerTool
10. threaded=True in app.run()
Report any violations.
